title: orchis sambucina var. incarnata
intro: Orchis sambucina var. incarnata, also known as the autumn lady's tresses, is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of orchis sambucina var. incarnata include its ability to treat various ailments such as respiratory issues, fever, and skin conditions. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves drying and powdering the roots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to reap its medicinal benefits.
